flashcards.front: What is a multilevel class hierarchy?
flashcards.back: A structure where a subclass derives from a superclass that itself derives from another superclass.
Animal → Mammal → Dog (each level inherits from the one above)
Promotes code reuse and logical organization of related classes.
A class from which another class inherits properties/methods.
Simplifies maintenance by isolating common features in higher-level classes.
